commit.message:
fix: Telegram bot improvements — inspect, dedup, context (#54)

* fix: handle Anthropic tool_use finish_reason in agent loop

The agent loop checked for finish_reason == "tool_calls" (OpenAI
format) but Anthropic returns "tool_use". This caused the loop to
break after round 1 without processing tool results, producing
empty responses ("no response generated").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add /inspect command to Telegram bot

Shows tool actions, sources, and timing from the last query.
Also captures statuses, sources, and perf_trace events from
the chat SSE stream for inspection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent duplicate Telegram messages from Claude Code sessions

[NOTIFY] messages were sent during assistant events AND re-extracted
from the result event, causing duplicates. Now skips re-extraction
when notifications were already sent during the session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: detect imperative follow-ups for conversation context retention

"look in my email", "check my calendar", "search drive for it" etc.
were not recognized as follow-ups, so the previous question's context
was lost. Added regex pattern for imperative verbs + data source nouns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add tests for PR review findings; strip PII from /inspect

- Add unit tests for expand_followup_query imperative patterns
- Add tests for orchestrator notification dedup (notifications_sent > 0)
- Move _IMPERATIVE_FOLLOWUP_RE to module level per convention
- Strip tool input args from /inspect output (show tool name only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: register service worker via SerwistProvider for iOS PWA

The service worker was built but never registered — SerwistProvider
from @serwist/next/react was missing. Also adds manifest id field
for stable iOS 16.4+ PWA identity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: disable navigationPreload for iOS PWA + sync-complete event

- Disable navigationPreload in SW (broke iOS standalone mode + offline)
- Move themeColor from metadata to viewport export (Next.js warning)
- Emit sync-complete event after syncPendingMutations succeeds
- CaeTab listens for sync-complete to refresh data immediately

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add alembic files to backend Dockerfile for railway up deploys

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: video upload webm support + PWA standalone mode preservation

- Add "webm" to CAE_ALLOWED_TYPES (backend rejected MediaRecorder output)
- Add 5min timeout to file upload requests (was 30s global default)
- Replace hard location.href redirects with event-based auth-logout pattern
- Use router.replace instead of router.push for PWA navigation stability
- Add viewport export to root layout for iOS PWA rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: PWA login scope, video upload corruption, CAE form responsiveness

- Move PWA meta tags from terrain layout to root layout metadata API
  so Safari sees them on /login (standalone mode works)
- Fix video upload: skip File double-wrapping when compressImage returns
  original file unchanged (compressed === file check)
- Make CAE/VT form responsive: sidebar collapses to horizontal scroll
  on mobile, wizard grids stack vertically on small screens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: update PROGRESS.md with PWA Sessions 1-4 completion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline file uploads with image/video compression (Session 4)

Photos compressed via Canvas API (5MB→300KB), videos capped at 1Mbps
bitrate (15MB→6MB). Files queue in IDB when offline, sync via FormData
through Axios on reconnect.

- compress-image.ts: Canvas API compression (max 1920px, JPEG 80%)
- offline-cae-service.ts: uploadFile, syncFileUpload, storage quota check
- cae-tab.tsx: handleFileUpload uses offlineCaeService (online + offline)
- video-record-dialog.tsx: videoBitsPerSecond 1Mbps cap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline VT form — mutation queue + sync on reconnect (Session 3)

Queue VT field saves in IndexedDB when offline, sync automatically
via Axios (main thread) on reconnect with 30s polling interval.

- mutation-queue.ts: IDB CRUD with 5-retry limit
- sync-status.tsx: compact offline/pending/syncing/synced indicator
- use-sync-status.ts: polling hook for pending mutation count
- layout.tsx: SyncStatus component + online event listener + periodic sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline caching infrastructure — IDB schema + online status hook (Session 2)

- db.ts: IndexedDB schema with mutation-queue, offline-files, cae-cache stores
- constants.ts: cache TTL configuration
- use-online-status.ts: reactive hook for navigator.onLine state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: PWA foundation — installable app with service worker (Session 1)

Add web app manifest, Serwist service worker, install prompt banner,
and configure Next.js build pipeline for PWA generation.

- manifest.json: standalone terrain app with icons
- sw.ts: Serwist service worker with terrain-scoped caching
- install-prompt.tsx: bottom banner with 7-day dismiss cooldown
- next.config.mjs: wrapped with @serwist/next plugin
- Dockerfile.prod: copy public assets to standalone output
- Dependencies: @serwist/next, serwist, idb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: wrap file upload in try/catch to prevent stuck uploading state

If /api/upload returns non-JSON (e.g. Render 500 HTML error), res.json()
would throw and uploading/uploadingIdx state would stay true forever,
permanently disabling the upload button. Fixed in cart, academy, and admin
store pages using finally block to guarantee state is reset.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 4-col store grid + file upload for manual proof in cart

Covers ads, wallet, marketplace, purchases/verify, store/items,

fix: add missing tomllib import for Python 3.11+ in test_pre_commit_hooks.py

The conditional import block had `pass` instead of `import tomllib` for

- Auto-format main.py (RelayNode code failed ruff format --check in CI)

  publishes independently — PyPI OIDC is not yet configured but Docker Hub is

  (matches the actual Hub account used for the v1.0.0 push)

CI was failing on every push due to formatting; publish was failing because
Docker was gated on PyPI OIDC which hasn't been configured yet.

commit.message:
ENH: Add Logfire observability across the notebook generation pipeline (#7)

Integrate Pydantic Logfire for end-to-end trace visibility. Each
pipeline stage (arXiv fetch, figure extraction, LLM calls, notebook
build) is wrapped in logfire.span() calls. LangChain OTEL tracing
is enabled via env vars in config.py so LLM-level detail (prompts,
responses, token usage) nests automatically inside pipeline spans.

- Add logfire[fastapi] as a required dependency
- Create observability.py for Logfire + FastAPI instrumentation
- Set LANGSMITH OTEL env vars in config.py before LangChain imports
- Wrap /generate pipeline stages with logfire.span() in fastapi_app.py
- Add sub-spans in figure_extractor for download and parsing with
  OTEL-native error recording (exceptions propagate through spans)
- Support LOGFIRE_ENVIRONMENT env var (defaults to "local")
- Update CLAUDE.md with observability module and env var docs

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: Kimi K2.5 reasoning→content promotion + trim order swap

Root cause of 0-char responses: Kimi puts responses in "reasoning"
field instead of "content" after processing tool results. Proxy now
promotes reasoning→content when content is null.

Also fixes trim order — system messages trimmed first (59K→4K) before
conversation history, so tool results survive between rounds instead
of being AGGRESSIVE-dropped.

Changes:
- Promote reasoning→content for Kimi K2.5 empty responses
- Fallback message for native 0-char and sanitized-to-0 responses
- Trim system messages BEFORE conversation history
- AGGRESSIVE trim tries last 4 before last 2 (keeps tool result pairs)
- Tool result truncation bumped 500→1500 chars
- Stronger anti-markup instruction in tool limiter
- Debug logging for empty responses (finish_reason, raw choice)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: respect session memory_enabled flag in auto_enrich_context injection

auto_enrich_context() was gated only by the global plugin config, not
the per-session memory_enabled toggle. When a user ran !mem off, the
conv_log save was correctly suppressed (routes.py) but context_injection
continued injecting ST/LT memory into every prompt.

Fix: check sessions[client_id]['memory_enabled'] before context_injection,
consistent with how conv_log gates it in routes.py.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Taskfile build task for library repo; add pre-commit hook

auth is a library with no binary entrypoint. Replace the gotemplate-
inherited binary build with `go build ./...` to compile all packages.
Drop unused BINARY_NAME/BUILD_DIR vars and the stale bin/ rm in clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Use ESPN BPI predictor for pre-game fair value, require 2+ sources

The ref value was based solely on Polymarket for pre-game games since
ESPN win probability is only available during live games. Now falls
back to ESPN's BPI predictor (gameProjection) for pre-game reference.

Also requires at least 2 reference sources (ESPN, DK, Polymarket) for
consensus fair value to avoid trading on a single thin reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Wholesale exclusion filter to shop-level view

Fix school count discrepancy between school and shop views.
Shop view was missing the Wholesale category exclusion filter,
causing it to include extra schools from Wholesale categories.

Changes:
- Add 'AND p.category_name NOT LIKE Wholesale%%' to shop SQL query
- Makes shop view consistent with school view filtering logic

This ensures both views show the same schools when using
identical date ranges and filters.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(provider): switch to fal-ai/scribble ControlNet for sketch fidelity

Replace generic image-to-image model (fal-ai/fast-sdxl) with purpose-built
ControlNet scribble model that uses sketch lines as structural conditioning.
Adds fal.ai storage upload step since ControlNet models require hosted URLs
(data URIs return 422). Warm latency ~4s, sketch fidelity verified.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix yt-mcp worker failover when GPU node goes down

Recreate strategy blocked all pod creation when a pod was stuck
Terminating on an unreachable node. Switch to RollingUpdate so
healthy pods keep running. Reduce unreachable/not-ready toleration
from 5min to 60s for faster rescheduling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: interactive profile — click-to-pick on Globe/Map, split view, 4 plot modes

- Globe/Map click to select profile observation point (lon/lat)
  - Map: reuses existing hover→UV coordinate transform
  - Globe: proper inverse view matrix (rot_y^T * rot_x^T) for ray-sphere intersection
- Split viewport: Globe/Map (60%) + Profile panel (40%) side by side
- Gold crosshair marker on Globe/Map showing selected point
  - Globe: view_proj projection with back-face culling via view matrix z-row
  - Map: UV→screen transform with pan/zoom
- 4 profile modes with toolbar toggle (Vertical / Time / T-Lev / 3D):
  - Vertical: 1D vertical profile (level dimension)
  - Time: 1D time series with playhead marker
  - T-Lev: Time × Level heatmap (ColorImage texture)
  - 3D: Isometric surface plot (z=level vertical, x=time depth, y=value lateral)
- TimeLevelData struct + DataStore::load_time_level_data() for 2D time×level loading
- Playhead only shown for time-based modes (not vertical profile)
- Profile title shows actual lon/lat degree values from grid coordinates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(installer): add dependsOn field for additional tool dependencies (#109) (#116)

* feat(installer): add dependsOn field for additional tool dependencies (#109)

Add dependsOn field to Installer spec for declaring additional tool
dependencies that affect DAG ordering without PATH injection. This
enables installers like krew that require multiple tools (kubectl + krew)
to declare all dependencies explicitly rather than relying on implicit
ordering via ToolSet.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: terashima <iscale821@gmail.com>

* fix(schema): correct CUE formatting for schema.cue

CUE comment lines break field alignment groups, so the extra
space padding on toolRef/dependsOn/bootstrap/commands was invalid.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: terashima <iscale821@gmail.com>

* fix(installer): tolerate dependsOn overlap with toolRef instead of erroring

toolRef and dependsOn have different responsibilities (PATH injection vs
DAG ordering). Their overlap is semantically valid redundancy, not a
conflict. Remove the Validate() error and deduplicate in Dependencies().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: terashima <iscale821@gmail.com>

* docs: add dependsOn field to installer documentation

Add dependsOn to the Installer fields table in cue-schema.md and the
dependency relationships list in design.md. Clarify toolRef vs dependsOn
responsibilities (PATH injection vs DAG ordering).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: terashima <iscale821@gmail.com>

commit.message:
fix: 講評で全体の会話を評価するように修正

**問題**:
- 表示メッセージを30件に制限した影響で、講評も30件しか見ていなかった
- 会話後半の内容が講評に反映されない可能性があった

**原因**:
- `getEvaluation(messages, ...)` を呼んでいたが、`messages` stateは
  最大30件に制限されていた
- 会話中の応答速度向上のための制限が、講評にも影響していた

**実施した修正**:

1. **講評用の全会話履歴を別途保持**
   ```typescript
   const fullMessagesForEvaluation = useRef<Message[]>([]);
   ```
   - 表示制限の影響を受けない専用の履歴
   - 全てのメッセージを保存（制限なし）

2. **自動同期メカニズム**
   - `messages` が更新される度に `fullMessagesForEvaluation` も更新
   - 新しいメッセージが追加されたら追記
   - クリアやシナリオ変更時はリセット

3. **講評生成時に全履歴を使用**
   ```typescript
   evalData = await getEvaluation(fullMessagesForEvaluation.current, scenarioId);
   ```
   - 表示件数に関わらず、全会話を評価

**仕組み**:
```
【会話中】
- API送信: 最新12件（速度優先）
- 表示: 最新30件（メモリ最適化）
- 講評用履歴: 全件保存（制限なし）

【講評生成時】
- 全件の会話履歴を使用
- 会話の最初から最後まで評価
```

**期待される効果**:
✅ 講評が全体の会話を正確に評価
✅ 長い会話でも全内容が講評に反映
✅ 会話中の応答速度は維持（12件送信）
✅ メモリ効率は維持（30件表示）

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Phase 15b: SF arrow fix + E2E tests for constraints/conflicts (#48)

* fix: correct SF arrow backward path routing — stub directions were reversed

SF arrows have start stub pointing left and end stub pointing right,
which is the opposite of FS. The backward path (dx <= 10) now routes
left from start and right to end for SF, while keeping the existing
right-from-start/left-to-end behavior for FS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add unit tests for SF/FS/FF/SS arrow path geometry

Tests cover:
- SF forward (simple bezier) and backward (left-from-start routing)
- FS backward regression (right-from-start routing)
- FF same-direction routing (rightward)
- SS same-direction routing (leftward)
- Arrowhead direction for SF (left) and FS (right)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(e2e): verify constraint cascade propagates across collaborator tabs

Enhance the existing constraint cross-tab test to verify that after
setting SNET constraint in pageA, pageB's task bars re-render correctly
(cascade propagated). Also add a new test verifying conflict indicators
(red dashed rects / warning circles) appear in collaborator tabs when
MSO constraint with a past date forces a conflict.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(e2e): add SF dependency arrow rendering test

Adds E2E test that changes an existing FS dependency to SF type via the
dependency editor modal, then verifies the arrow renders with a left-pointing
arrowhead (characteristic of SF arrows). Restores original state afterward.
